code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = 0
  mut cur_start = 0
  mut cur_len = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_space = false
    if i == n
      is_space = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_space
      if cur_len > 0
        if cur_len > best_len
          best_len = cur_len
          best = string.substring(line, cur_start, cur_start + cur_len)
        end
        cur_len = 0
      end
      cur_start = i + 1
    else
      cur_len = cur_len + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("longest=#{best}")
end
